title: Wedding list for now — full guest enumeration, Jun 2025
html:
TL;DR

  • Yahir's first captured wedding-guest list (Jun 22 2025), grouped by relationship.
  • Core 4: Emilio, Valeria (Jacoby), Dad, Mom.
  • Dad's family: Maya, Chava, Tío Bernardo, Tia Maraly, Brandon (Erika), Alexis, Desiree (Cade), Mauro, Margorie, Mauricio, Tia Marga.
  • Mom's family: Tío Edgar, Maile, Dominic, Sammy, Tia Ale, Tío Marcos, Chikis, Natalia, Tita, Tito.
  • Friends: Cam Jipp 25, David (Kylie), Owen Davis, Kyle Nguyen, Riley Edgar, Andrew, Ayden Brogden, Henry Osmer, Luke, Kai, Huck, Hemi (Maddie), Isaac, GSmitty.
  • Alts: Sherri/Brad, Ann/Wayne, Araceli/Manuel, Cynthia/Doble AAs, Jann, Brenda/Vincent, Ms Mac.

Key context

Wedding-list is "for now" — Yahir is single but already enumerating his social architecture in marriage-event terms. Pairs with the lineage as fate / the one criterion frame.

Why it matters in the graph

  • Single most authoritative enumeration of Yahir's social universe in the corpus. Every name worth checking against the entity index for adequate stub coverage.
  • New first-mention names that pass the "significance" threshold (extended family, named with parenthetical partner): Maya, Chava, Tío Bernardo, Brandon, Tio Edgar, Maile, Sammy, Cam Jipp, David, Riley Edgar, Henry Osmer, Luke, Huck, Hemi, Isaac, GSmitty.
  • Brenda + Vincent — Brenda already an entity (brenda aguilera); Vincent is her partner — note for Brenda's page.
  • The alts list documents Yahir's Grants Pass godparents / mentor circle (Ann + Wayne, Sherri + Brad, Ms Mac).

Open questions

  • Why "for now"? Implied iteration. Has it been updated?
  • Who is Cam Jipp 25 specifically — the 25 a year-of-graduation tag?
  • Wedding date target? With nobody currently in alignment per 2026 03 24 alignment misalignment, the timeline is open.

Wikilinks
